rationale: Entire career at HCL (IT services) plus a role at fictional Wayne Enterprises; self-learner AI only with no production IR or embedding system deployment despite Milvus listed as a skill.
Non-technical career spanning business analyst, content writer, and customer support roles at TCS and Infosys with no ML or software engineering work whatsoever.

14-year career is entirely content writing, SEO, and mechanical engineering with roles at multiple fictional companies (Stark Industries, Pied Piper, Wayne Enterprises) and zero AI/ML engineering experience.

Entire career at IT services firms (Wipro, Cognizant) and fictional Stark Industries doing DevOps/frontend work; Pinecone listed as advanced skill but no production IR or ranking system evidence in any role.

Full-stack web developer whose roles are predominantly at fictional companies (Pied Piper, Dunder Mifflin) and TCS, with no AI/ML or information retrieval work and multiple beginner skills listed with minimal duration.

Strong data engineering background (Snowflake, Airflow, dbt) but primarily at TCS and fictional Pied Piper with no production retrieval or ranking work; CNN and Speech Recognition skills signal misaligned ML domain.

11.7-year career consists entirely of sales, project management, mechanical, and civil engineering roles at non-technical and fictional companies (Dunder Mifflin), despite IIT Guwahati education; no ML or software engineering.

Only 3.6 years experience but built at genuine product companies (Zomato, Paytm) with hands-on Milvus (advanced) and Vector Search (intermediate) skills and data pipeline work, though no ranking/evaluation framework or embedding retrieval system has been shipped to production users.

3.5-year career limited to customer support at fictional Dunder Mifflin and marketing manager at Infosys with no engineering or ML work; GANs listed as advanced is unsupported by any technical role in the profile.

Entire 4.2-year career at IT services firms (Capgemini, Mphasis) doing frontend and Android mobile work; RL, Kubeflow, and ASR skills indicate CV/speech domain with no NLP, IR, or retrieval system experience.
